c74object.name: tap.808.snare~
c74object.digest: TR-808-style snare drum voice, synthesized from the analog circuit
c74object.description: The tap.808.snare~ object is a circuit-informed model of the Roland TR-808 snare drum voice, built from the original schematic: two bridged-T resonators — the fundamental (~173 Hz) and harmonic (~336 Hz) modes, in Roland's late-revision tuning — blended by the tone control, plus the "snappy" path: bright high-passed noise through a fast envelope. Trigger it with a signal: a rising edge fires the voice, and the amplitude of the edge (0..1) is the accent (the hardware's trigger-bus voltage — harder excitation, not just louder). Tone, snappy, and level mirror the hardware panel; tuning and seed are extensions beyond the panel, stock at their defaults. Single-channel: wrap in mc. and give each instance a different seed to decorrelate the noise.

inlet.digest: Trigger: a rising edge fires the voice; edge amplitude (0..1) is the accent

method.name: signal
method.description: A rising edge triggers the drum, sample-accurately; the value the signal rises to (0..1) is the accent.

method.name: bang
method.description: Trigger the drum at full accent (from the scheduler).

method.name: trigger
method.description: Trigger the drum with an accent value (0..1, default 1).

method.name: clear
method.description: Reset all circuit state, silencing any ringing tail.

attribute.name: tone
attribute.description: Balance of the two resonators, 0..1 (default 0.5): 0 is all fundamental (~173 Hz, deep), 1 all harmonic (~336 Hz, hard). The hardware knob's travel.

attribute.name: snappy
attribute.description: Depth of the bright enveloped noise burst, 0..1 (default 0.5) — the snare's "wires". At 0 the voice is just the two resonators (a tom-like thud).

attribute.name: tuning
attribute.digest: Circuit bend: pitch ratio (default 1 = stock ~173/336 Hz)
attribute.description: Pitch as a ratio of the stock tuning, 0.25..4 (default 1), scaling both resonators together. Roland's own first-edition units shipped a sharper tuning (~238/476 Hz) — about 1.4 here.

attribute.name: seed
attribute.description: Seed for the noise source (default 1). Renders are bit-reproducible per seed; give mc. instances different seeds to decorrelate.
